rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume/guarantee clauses, equations, constants, and assignments
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to ports
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) in contracts
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'eq name : type = expression;' for equations
Use 'const name : type = value;' for constants
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved identifiers; use existing visible identifiers
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types (e.g., integer, boolean)
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
